typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-white
typography.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-white

components.button_primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 text-sm font-medium tracking-[0.1em] uppercase
components.button_outline: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 text-sm font-medium tracking-[0.1em] uppercase
components.glass_card: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 p-6 md:p-8 hover:bg-white/[0.04] transition-all duration-500
components.input_field: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-[#D4AF37] text-white px-0 py-3 w-full outline-none transition-colors
components.badge: bg-[#D4AF37]/10 text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37]/30 px-3 py-1 text-xs tracking-wider uppercase

animations.bottle_3d_tilt: Use framer-motion useTransform and useMotionValue to create a 3D perspective tilt effect based on mouse movement over the image container on the product detail page.
animations.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}

design_rules.rule_1: No pure white backgrounds anywhere. Use #050505 as the base.
design_rules.rule_2: Headlines must use Cormorant Garamond with tight tracking. Body must use Outfit.
design_rules.rule_3: Do not center align large paragraphs of text. Left align text blocks for luxury editorial feel.
design_rules.rule_4: Use massive negative space (py-32) between sections to let the products breathe.
design_rules.rule_5: Images must have overlay gradients when text is placed on top (e.g., bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent).
design_rules.rule_6: Buttons are sharp-edged (no border-radius) or max rounded-sm to maintain a high-fashion, serious tone.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark silk with blue/gold tones for hero section

product_feature_1.description: Gold luxury perfume bottle on dark background

product_feature_2.description: Close-up of hands holding a luxury perfume bottle

product_feature_3.description: Clear glass perfume bottle on dark textured fabric

mood_dark_masculine.description: Skull-shaped dark perfume bottle for men/woody category

lifestyle_women.description: Luxury fashion model woman in sheer black dress for category/mood bento grid

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Cormorant Garamond' (weights 300, 400, 600) and 'Outfit' (weights 300, 400, 500) from Google Fonts.
Configure Tailwind CSS to use the colors and fonts defined above.
Build a custom pure HTML+Tailwind UI for marketing pages (Home, Product Detail) avoiding standard Shadcn card wrappers to allow for complex overlapping and full-bleed glass effects.
For the animated bottle cards: wrap the image in a framer-motion div that triggers a gentle floating animation on hover.
Ensure all text over images uses text-shadow or a dark gradient overlay for WCAG AA contrast.
Implement the 'Shop by Mood' section as an asymmetrical Bento grid (Mode A) to create an editorial layout.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').
